title: Information Analysis
wikitext:
[[File:FFI Bestiary PS.png|thumb|400px|A bestiary in ''Final Fantasy'', showing off an enemy who has been analyzed completely.]]

==Summary==
'''Information Analysis''', or '''Scanning''', is the ability to gain information on a character or object by analyzing them. A basic analysis can grant only rudimentary data on the target, such as their level of strength, speed, durability, or intelligence, while more powerful analyses can grant extensive information on the target's abilities and even personal history. This ability often overlaps with [[Power Mimicry]], allowing a character to copy another after analyzing them.

==Users==
* [[Sylar (Heroes)|Gabriel Gray]] ([[Heroes (TV Series)|Heroes]])
* [[Gatchmon (Haru Shinkai)|Gatchmon]] and his evolutions ([[Digimon|Digimon Universe: Appli Monsters]])
* Several characters, such as White Mages ([[Final Fantasy]])
* Eagle Vision users ([[Assassin's Creed]])
* [[Samus Aran (Legendary Suit)|Samus Aran]] ([[Metroid (Verse)|Metroid]])
* [[Ainz Ooal Gown]] and his [[Shalltear Bloodfallen|Fl]][[Cocytus (Overlord)|oo]][[Aura Bella Fiora|r G]][[Mare Bello Fiora|ua]][[Demiurge (Overlord)|rd]][[Albedo (Overlord)|ia]][[Pandora’s Actor|n]][[Sebas Tian|s]] ([[Overlord (Verse)|Overlord]])
